text:
According to GNU license statement, you have to distribute source
files for xwpe in waltnut creek's cdroms.
Port distribution files does not contain this sources.

Fix: 

include them.
How-To-Repeat: look for:  xwpe-1.5.18a.tar.gz
in walnut creek's ports distribution files
